title: The Secret of the Whispering Woods
setting: A mystical forest on a sunny afternoon

scenes.text: One sunny afternoon, Timmy ventured deeper into the woods than he ever had before. He noticed something peculiar: a small, glimmering light flickering among the trees. As he approached, he discovered an entrance to a hidden underground world.
scenes.image_description: Timmy approaching a glowing entrance hidden behind tall, sunlit ferns

scenes.text: Inside, Timmy found a tiny creature named Whiskers. Whiskers was no taller than Timmy's thumb and had sparkling wings that matched the glow of the hidden world. They became fast friends, exploring the glowing caverns together.
scenes.image_description: Timmy and Whiskers holding hands, walking through glowing tunnels filled with bioluminescent plants

scenes.text: As they explored deeper, Timmy discovered that Whiskers' light could make flowers bloom in an instant. With a heart full of joy, Timmy used Whiskers' magic to create a beautiful meadow in the woods. They promised to keep their magical secret and meet again.
scenes.image_description: Timmy smiling as he watches Whiskers' light transform a bare patch of forest into a vibrant meadow

meta.enhanced_prompt: During an afternoon walk, a curious boy stumbles upon something extraordinary hidden deep within the mysterious woods.
